title: anthonotha stipulacea
intro: Anthonotha stipulacea, also known as the African bush mango tree, is a deciduous tree native to tropical Africa. It is rich in medicinal properties, particularly its seeds, which contain a high concentration of vitamins, minerals, and antioxidants. The seeds of Anthonotha stipulacea have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to their anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, the seeds are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to promote overall health and well-being.
